Grid.TextBlock:
Welcome to Sea Power, Commander!
In this mission, you command the Sovremenny Strike Group assigned to protect the Narvik landing. NATO naval units are attempting a counterattack to dislodge our forces from the beachhead.
You command Sovremenny (EM-680) and Vice-Admiral Kulakov (BPK-401), two of the most modern escort ships in the Soviet Northern Fleet. Use Sovremenny’s anti-ship missiles to destroy the approaching NATO force, while Kulakov’s SA-N-9 SAM system provides air defense for your group. Note that Kulakov also carries SS-N-14B missiles which can be used to attack ships. A Tu-95RT reconnaissance aircraft overhead will provide radar coverage.
ENEMY FORCES:
Norwegian force approaching from the south:
• Oslo-class frigate
• Sleipner-class corvette
• 2 x F-5A attack aircraft
American task group approaching from the west:
• Perry-class frigate
• Knox-class frigate
• Newport-class landing ship
RULES OF ENGAGEMENT (ROE):
• You are cleared to destroy all hostile (red) forces.
EMISSIONS CONTROL (EMCON):
• No restrictions. Keep all radars active to ensure we detect all enemy contacts.
OBJECTIVE:
• At least one of your ships must survive.
• Destroy all enemy ships encountered.
Good luck, Commander!
